app.name: Server Block Nuxt
app.one_liner: A Nuxt 3 module that enables <server> blocks in Single File Components to co-locate API handlers with page components.

screens.name: Main Page Component Editor
screens.purpose: Allows developers to author Nuxt pages with embedded <server> blocks for API logic.

rust_commands.name: install_module
rust_commands.purpose: Installs the @hebilicious/server-block-nuxt Nuxt module and its Volar companion.

mvp_plan: week 1: Create a page with a <server> block
week 1: Verify endpoint is generated and functional
acceptance_tests: After installing the module, a <server> block in a .vue file compiles into a working API endpoint.
The Volar extension is automatically available in the IDE for type-checking server blocks.
